obligations.claim: The SC_SINGLE payload count reaches the 32-byte FL expected payload length in scoreboard and wave evidence.
The SC_SINGLE SRAM pack transaction emits one contiguous 32-byte SRAM write after the payload count is visible.
The SC_SINGLE descriptor publication is visible in scoreboard and VCD evidence after a descriptor push event.
For SC_RB_4096 the SRAM payload digest observed in RTL equals the FL-expected payload digest, proving full byte-content equivalence with no holes.
